description: You've reached the highest point. Below, the world of Screaming Fred looks like a messy bedroom. To the east, you see a strange distortion in the air. Down below, you notice a dark hole — the entrance to the Hidden Hideout! Willy warns you: 'Do not enter the hideout, or you will be lost!'

wall.description: The edge of the peak. It's a long way down.

peak_telescope.name: Battered Telescope
peak_telescope.description: A telescope pointing toward the horizon.
peak_telescope.onInteract: You look through the telescope. You see the far-off lands of Textlandia, where words have weight and commas are sharp.

hideout_hole.name: Dark Hole
hideout_hole.description: A gaping hole in the mountain floor. You can hear echoes from below. Willy warned you not to go in... but the path forward lies through the depths.

conditions.failMessage: The distortion is unstable! You need a powerful energy source to stabilize the portal. Maybe that humming capacitor back in the desert had something...
